---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this demo
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the use case or pain point.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. Note if it touches the pure core (`src/core/`), the RN
UI (`src/app/`), or native (`src/native/` / platform projects).

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches or workarounds.

**Additional context**
Links, references, or examples from other apps/models.
